campaignLabel: The Powder Keg — Five-Day Accra Riots
historicalContext: Nii Kwabena Bonne III's AWAM boycott had Accra on edge. The Crossroads shootings broke the barrier of fear.
premise: Four ordinary Ghanaian youths — led by tactical commander Kojo and enforcer Araba — rise against colonial control while mentor Yaw keeps the underground alive. Kwesi handles intel; Kofi grows from rookie to fighter.
nameCollisionNote: Phase IV Kofi (rookie skirmisher) is NOT Kofi Asare (Phase I–III double-agent clerk). Phase IV Kwesi (Secretariat clerk) is NOT the same person as either.
gameplaySynergy: Kojo (1st): squad orders, flank, smoke traps, command view
Araba (2nd): Riot Rally bailout, heavy melee, choke-point hold
Kofi: suppressing fire → grows via Fast Learner XP
Kwesi: wiretap, vault raids, mediation — protect at all costs
Yaw (hub): upgrades, maintenance, historical briefings between missions
storyLocks: Martyrs remain dead; youths seek justice not resurrection
AWAM warehouses valid; innocent stalls protected
Yaw does not fight on frontline during missions
Kofi Asare (Phase I–III) never confused with Phase IV Kofi in UI

mentor.name: Emmanuel "Yaw" Mensah
mentor.occupation: Motor-yard foreman; boycott committee logistics coordinator
mentor.history: Grandfather was a WWII Gold Coast Regiment veteran, severely wounded alongside the men who fell at Christiansborg Crossroads. Yaw keeps the cell's supply lines, safehouses, and weapon caches running — he does not march into firefights with the youth.
mentor.tagline: My grandfather marched unarmed. I will not bury four more children in his name.

roster.name: Kojo
roster.history: Refused to let colonial forces control the neighborhoods after Crossroads. Leads from the flanks — map control, positioning, smoke traps — not brute force.
roster.tagline: They expect a riot. I give them a strategy.

roster.name: Araba "Asantewaa" Oforiwaa
roster.history: Cousin wounded in Crossroads secondary volleys. Named Asantewaa for uncompromising stand against AWAM price fixing. Physical hammer when Kojo's plans go loud.
roster.tagline: You shot the men who wore your khaki. You do not get to sell us hunger anymore.

dynamicCommand.description: Control shifts to Araba; breaks enemy lines to extract Kojo

roster.name: Kofi
roster.history: Young, energetic, completely inexperienced. Joined out of righteous fury after witnessing Crossroads. Clumsy dodges and shaky aim at first.
roster.tagline: I didn't know how to hold a rifle yesterday. I will learn today.

roster.name: Kwesi
roster.history: Brilliant clerical worker. Uses satchel, forged documents, and intellect to dismantle security from within. Completely defenseless in firefights.
roster.tagline: They wrote the laws to bind us. I read every line they hide.
